summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Voletron Engenharia Elétrica landing page. All core functionality working correctly including WhatsApp CTAs, navigation anchors, video play button, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Page loads successfully with all sections visible
All 7 WhatsApp CTAs redirect to correct number (5571999192508)
Video play button functions properly in projects section
Projects section shows 4 project cards with real client images
Authority section displays 4 stats and 4 credentials
Mobile responsiveness works with proper mobile menu
Floating WhatsApp button visible and functional
Footer contains all required information and links
All data-testid attributes present on interactive elements
Hero section displays '90%' savings headline prominently
All images load correctly from client assets
